---
name: Review Comment
about: Submit feedback or suggestions for the LaTeX document
title: '[REVIEW] '
labels: review-comment
assignees: ''
---

## Section/Location
<!-- Specify where in the document this comment applies (e.g., "Section 2.1", "Page 3, Introduction", "Line 45 in document.tex") -->


## Description of the Issue
<!-- Clearly describe what needs attention or improvement -->


## Suggested Improvement
<!-- Provide your suggestion for how to address this issue -->


## Priority Level
<!-- Select one priority level by placing an 'x' in the brackets, e.g., [x] -->

- [ ] Critical - Must be fixed before publication
- [ ] Important - Should be fixed soon
- [ ] Nice to have - Consider for future revisions

---

### For Authors
When you address this review comment in a commit, reference this issue number in your commit message to automatically link them:
- Use `fixes #ISSUE_NUMBER` to close the issue automatically when the commit is merged
- Use `addresses #ISSUE_NUMBER` or `relates to #ISSUE_NUMBER` to reference without closing

Example commit message: `Improved introduction clarity (fixes #123)`
